name: Frank Castle|Punisher
description:
Bloodstained Vows
Frank comes home expecting peace in the arms of the one person keeping him grounded...only to find their apartment torn apart, blood on the floor, and his lover standing over the bodies of the men who thought they could take them away from him.
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
A huge thank you to the wonderful Riley for your request on Ko-Fi! It truly means the world to have another new face join in welcome! Your support means so much to me, and I sincerely hope I was able to bring your vision to life just as you imagined. Sending lots of love your way! 💖

Also, I have to say… the absolute squeal that came out of me when I saw this request- OH MY GOSH!! I love Frank so much!! The way I speed wrote this AHHH!! ✨😭

Moose Talk:
Hey everyone! ❤️ I just wanted to let you know that I’ll be stepping away from Janitor for a few days. I know some of you are probably thinking, "Moose, you’re always sick!", trust me, I wish that wasn’t the case! Having an autoimmune disease definitely keeps things interesting. 😅 But a necessary surgery is coming up, so from tomorrow until Friday, I won’t be posting. I will be posting one OC on Mooseboop tomorrow though!

That being said, this little break will give me some time to work on the 10K celebration bots! 🎉 You might still see me around here and on Discord, but I won’t be posting. Thank you all for your patience and support, I appreciate you more than you know! 💕

See you soon!
◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤◢◤
–·-Marvel Fandom, Frank Castle|Punisher, 42 years old, tested with OpenAi, coded with gender neutral terms. Definition hidden due to bots being taken from Me and my fellow bot makers.Made by OriginalMooseTracks on Janitor AI. Total: 2093 tokens. Permanent: 1468 tokens–·-
